howItWorks.title: How CopyMonster Works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps to copy that sells

step1.title: Map Your DNA
step1.description: Answer guided strategic questions across 12 blocks. CopyMonster deeply understands your business, audience, pain points, and differentiators.

step2.title: Choose Your Agent
step2.description: 25 specialists ready for you: VSL, sales pages, emails, ads, launches, automated funnels, and much more.

step3.title: Get Ready-to-Use Copy
step3.description: In minutes, professional and persuasive content ready to use. No editing. No rework. Ready to publish.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CopyMonster

niche.question: Does it work for any niche or type of business?
niche.answer: Yes. CopyMonster works for any niche because all copy is based on your business DNA mapping. Whether you're a coach, consultant, e-commerce, SaaS, course creator, or service provider, the agents adapt the copy to your specific reality.

skills.question: Do I need copywriting skills to use it?
skills.answer: No. You don't need to be a copywriter. CopyMonster does all the heavy lifting. You just answer the mapping questions and choose the agent. The AI handles the rest.

time.question: How long does it take to create a complete campaign?
time.answer: It depends on the campaign, but on average you get ready copy in 5-15 minutes. More complex campaigns like 7-day launches may take a bit longer, but nothing compared to weeks of waiting with traditional copywriters.

languages.question: Can I use it in Portuguese, English, and Spanish?
languages.answer: Yes. CopyMonster automatically detects the language you write in and responds in the same language. Works perfectly in Portuguese, English, and Spanish.

results.question: What if I don't like the result?
results.answer: You can refine the copy by chatting with the agent. Ask for adjustments, tone changes, more urgency, etc. Plus, the 7-day free trial lets you experiment without commitment.

difference.question: What's the difference from ChatGPT or other AIs?
difference.answer: ChatGPT is generic. CopyMonster is specialized in copywriting with 25 agents trained on conversion frameworks, business DNA mapping, and prompts optimized for each type of material. The quality and specificity are unmatched.

items.quote: In 15 minutes I created a sales page that used to take 2 weeks with my copywriter. And it converted 23% better on the first test.
items.author: Marina Costa

items.quote: The business DNA makes all the difference. The copy comes out with my voice, it doesn't sound generic. My clients ask who wrote it.
items.author: Ricardo Mendes

items.quote: I used Launch Monster for my last launch. Made 47k in 3 days with a list of only 800 people. The email sequence was killer.
items.author: Juliana Ferreira

chat.startConversationDesc: Type your message below to begin

vsl_monster.title: Let's Create Your High-Converting VSL
vsl_monster.description: Tell me about your product/service, target audience, and the transformation you offer. I'll create a persuasive video sales script optimized for conversion.

sales_page_monster.title: Ready to Create Your Irresistible Sales Page
sales_page_monster.description: Share details about your product, the problems it solves, and your differentiators. I'll structure a complete sales page with headlines, bullets, and high-converting CTAs.

launch_monster.title: Let's Plan Your Strategic Launch
launch_monster.description: Tell me about your product and audience. I'll create a complete launch strategy with email sequences, posts, and scripts that generate anticipation and sales.

email_monster.title: Time to Create Emails That Convert
email_monster.description: Describe your product, your list, and the campaign goal. I'll create persuasive email marketing sequences that nurture leads and generate sales.

ads_monster.title: Let's Create High-Performance Ads
ads_monster.description: Tell me about your product, audience, and platform (Meta, Google, etc.). I'll create optimized ad copy that stops the scroll and generates clicks.

headline_monster.title: Ready to Create Magnetic Headlines
headline_monster.description: Describe your product and the context of use (email, page, ad). I'll generate multiple irresistible headline options that capture attention instantly.

short_monster.title: Let's Create Viral Short Video Scripts
short_monster.description: Tell me about your product and main message. I'll create 1-minute scripts optimized for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts that delight and convert.

internal_launch_monster.title: Complete 7-Day Internal Launch Campaign
internal_launch_monster.description: I'll create the entire sequence of emails, posts, and scripts for a 7-day internal launch. Tell me about your product and customer base.

flash_launch_monster.title: 3-Day Flash Launch with Maximum Urgency
flash_launch_monster.description: High-pressure flash campaign with all assets. Tell me about your offer and list to create an irresistible 3-day sequence.

evergreen_funnel_monster.title: Automated Funnel That Sells 24/7
evergreen_funnel_monster.description: I'll create a complete evergreen funnel with emails, pages, and automated sequences. Describe your product and sales goal.

webinar_campaign_monster.title: Complete Webinar Campaign with Sales Pitch
webinar_campaign_monster.description: Complete sequence: invitations, reminders, webinar script, and follow-up. Tell me about your webinar and offer to create everything.

cart_recovery_monster.title: High-Converting Abandoned Cart Recovery
cart_recovery_monster.description: I'll create email sequences and messages optimized to recover lost sales. Describe your product and checkout process.

lead_nurture_monster.title: Nurturing Sequence That Turns Leads into Customers
lead_nurture_monster.description: I'll create a nurturing sequence that warms cold leads until they're ready to buy. Tell me about your product and audience.

upsell_cross_monster.title: Maximize Value with Strategic Upsell and Cross-sell
upsell_cross_monster.description: I'll create post-purchase campaigns that increase average order value. Describe your products and upsell opportunities.

list_revival_monster.title: Powerful Cold List Reactivation
list_revival_monster.description: I'll create a re-engagement sequence that wakes up inactive leads. Tell me about your list and available offers.

full_vsl_script_monster.title: Complete Professional VSL Script
full_vsl_script_monster.description: I'll create a complete, structured VSL script for high conversion. Describe your product, main promise, and audience.

whatsapp_sales_monster.title: Sales Sequences Optimized for WhatsApp
whatsapp_sales_monster.description: I'll create persuasive message templates and sequences for WhatsApp sales. Tell me about your product and sales process.
